title: [codereview-pass1.4 correctness] rf_health.rs: SnrStats::update still uses hardcoded >>3 after Rssi change
description: Inconsistency between RSSI and SNR EMA. Must update SnrStats similarly and its comments. This would cause different convergence rates. file: rust/lichen-core/src/rf_health.rs:225
close_reason: SnrStats::update now uses EMA_ALPHA_SHIFT const=2 matching RssiStats (no hardcoded >>3). Comments updated for CCP-15 consistency. Part of rf_health EMA refactor. 3 clean codereview passes with no findings filed. All tests pass.
